proposed_hypotheses.text: Each one-level increase in `feature_027` is associated with a lower probability of `objective_response`.

analyses.result_summary: Response declined across feature_027 levels: level 0 0.231 (n=17592), level 1 0.174 (n=24971), level 2 0.129 (n=7437); linear probability slope per level was -0.0522.
analyses.method: Linear probability trend test for ordinal feature_027.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_025=1` is associated with a higher probability of `objective_response` than `feature_025=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Response was 0.235 for feature_025=1 (n=15014) versus 0.167 for feature_025=0 (n=34986).

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_015=1` is associated with a higher probability of `objective_response` than `feature_015=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Response was 0.221 for feature_015=1 (n=20056) versus 0.165 for feature_015=0 (n=29944).

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_023=1` is associated with a higher probability of `objective_response` than `feature_023=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Response was 0.220 for feature_023=1 (n=20020) versus 0.166 for feature_023=0 (n=29980).

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_001=1` is associated with a lower probability of `objective_response` than `feature_001=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Response was 0.168 for feature_001=1 (n=7462) versus 0.191 for feature_001=0 (n=42538).

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_032=1` is associated with a lower probability of `objective_response` than `feature_032=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Response was 0.166 for feature_032=1 (n=4985) versus 0.190 for feature_032=0 (n=45015).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each 10-unit increase in `feature_044` is associated with a lower probability of `objective_response`.

analyses.result_summary: The estimated response change per 10-unit increase in feature_044 was -0.00024, with no statistical evidence of association.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each one-unit increase in `feature_004` is associated with a lower probability of `objective_response`.

analyses.result_summary: The estimated response change per one-unit increase in feature_004 was -0.00522.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each 10-unit increase in `feature_031` is associated with a lower probability of `objective_response`.

analyses.result_summary: The estimated response change per 10-unit increase in feature_031 was -0.00748.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each one-unit increase in `feature_059` is associated with a higher probability of `objective_response`.

analyses.result_summary: The estimated response change per one-unit increase in feature_059 was 0.01788.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each one-unit increase in `feature_033` is associated with a lower probability of `objective_response`.

analyses.result_summary: The estimated response change per one-unit increase in feature_033 was -0.00086.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `feature_053` is associated with a lower probability of `objective_response`, including lower response when `feature_053>=20`.

analyses.result_summary: The estimated response change per 10-unit increase in feature_053 was -0.00252.
Patients with feature_053>=20 had response 0.176 (n=15630) versus 0.193 below 20 (n=34370).

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for the strongest binary and continuous features, `feature_025=1` remains associated with higher `objective_response`.
After adjustment for the strongest binary and continuous features, higher `feature_027` remains associated with lower `objective_response`.
After adjustment for the strongest binary and continuous features, higher `feature_004` remains associated with lower `objective_response`.
After adjustment for the strongest binary and continuous features, higher `feature_059` remains associated with higher `objective_response`.
After adjustment for the strongest binary and continuous features, each 10-unit increase in `feature_044` remains associated with lower `objective_response`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for feature_025 was 0.06751.
Adjusted coefficient per one level of feature_027 was -0.05224.
Adjusted coefficient per one unit of feature_004 was -0.00519.
Adjusted coefficient per one unit of feature_059 was 0.01806.
Adjusted coefficient per 10-unit increase in feature_044 was -0.00071 and was not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The response increase associated with `feature_015=1` is larger when `feature_025=1`, producing a positive `feature_015` by `feature_025` interaction.

analyses.result_summary: Difference-in-differences interaction was 0.1926; response was 0.349 when both were 1 versus about 0.166-0.159 for single-positive groups.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `feature_015=1` with `objective_response` is concentrated in the subgroup with `feature_025=1`.

analyses.result_summary: Within feature_025=1, feature_015=1 had response 0.349 versus 0.159 for feature_015=0.
Within feature_025=0, feature_015=1 had response 0.166 versus 0.168 for feature_015=0.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The response increase associated with `feature_025=1` is larger when `feature_023=1`, producing a positive `feature_025` by `feature_023` interaction.

analyses.result_summary: Difference-in-differences interaction was 0.1908; response was 0.347 when both were 1.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The response increase associated with `feature_015=1` is larger when `feature_023=1`, producing a positive `feature_015` by `feature_023` interaction.

analyses.result_summary: Difference-in-differences interaction was 0.1528; response was 0.308 when both were 1.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_001=1` attenuates the response increase associated with `feature_025=1`, producing a negative `feature_001` by `feature_025` interaction.

analyses.result_summary: The feature_001 by feature_025 difference-in-differences interaction was -0.0958; feature_025 was strongly positive only when feature_001=0.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_032=1` attenuates the response increase associated with `feature_025=1`, producing a negative `feature_025` by `feature_032` interaction.

analyses.result_summary: The feature_025 by feature_032 difference-in-differences interaction was -0.0755; response for feature_025=1 and feature_032=1 was 0.165.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_032=1` attenuates the response increase associated with `feature_015=1`, producing a negative `feature_015` by `feature_032` interaction.

analyses.result_summary: The feature_015 by feature_032 difference-in-differences interaction was -0.0458.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The co-occurrence of the two negative main-effect features, `feature_001=1` and `feature_032=1`, further lowers `objective_response` beyond additivity.

analyses.result_summary: The feature_001 by feature_032 difference-in-differences interaction was 0.0181, not a significant extra negative interaction.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_015=1`, `feature_025=1`, and `feature_023=1` have a much higher probability of `objective_response` than patients without all three features present.

analyses.result_summary: The all-three-positive subgroup had response 0.633 (n=2401) versus 0.165 among all other patients (n=47599).
analyses.method: Two-proportion z-test comparing all-three-positive patients with all others.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a multivariable model containing `feature_015`, `feature_025`, `feature_023`, their pairwise terms, and their three-way term, the three-way interaction is positive.

analyses.result_summary: The adjusted three-way coefficient for feature_015 x feature_025 x feature_023 was 0.4624.
analyses.method: Linear probability model with main effects, pairwise interactions, three-way interaction, feature_001, feature_032, and feature_027.

analyses.result_summary: After adding the three-way term, the feature_015 x feature_025 pair coefficient was 0.0079 and was not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `feature_015=1` with `objective_response` becomes smaller as `feature_027` increases.

analyses.result_summary: The feature_015 by feature_027 interaction coefficient was -0.0044 and was not significant; feature_015 remained positively associated at feature_027 levels 0, 1, and 2.
analyses.method: Linear probability model with feature_015, feature_027, and their interaction.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `feature_044` and `objective_response` is more positive among patients with `feature_066=1` than among patients with `feature_066=0`.
The association between `feature_053` and `objective_response` is more negative among patients with `feature_068=1` than among patients with `feature_068=0`.

analyses.result_summary: The feature_044 slope difference for feature_066=1 versus 0 was 0.0129 per 10 units; slopes were 0.00107 and -0.00022 per unit.
analyses.method: Difference in continuous feature slopes by binary subgroup.

analyses.result_summary: The feature_053 slope difference for feature_068=1 versus 0 was -0.0077 per 10 units; the negative feature_053 slope was steeper in feature_068=1.
analyses.method: Difference in continuous feature slopes by binary subgroup.
